query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder)
SELECT l.id, 
  CONCAT('What is a key principle taught in "', l.title, '"?'),
  'multiple_choice',
  '["Understanding biblical foundations","Applying spiritual principles","Both A and B","None of the above"]',
  'Both A and B',
  1
FROM lessons l
JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id
WHERE c.code = 'DIV102'
AND l.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT lessonId FROM quiz_questions);
